narrative:
Fairborn 211 (precinct in Greene County) has 703 registered voters, with 65.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
